case_title: THE PRUDENTIAL BANK AND TRUST COMPANY vs. BELL, LAWRENCE et al

docket_entries.description: CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PRUDENTIAL BANK AND TRUST COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT BELL, LAWRENCE BELL, BERNADETTE DOES 1 TO 5, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          OCT-03-1996 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-05-1996 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       SEP-13-1996
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF OCT-03-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), IF NO APPEARANCE AND/OR GOOD CAUSE SANCTIONS MAY BE APPLIED.
